abilities.name: Leap Aside (Mask)
abilities.description: After attack fails, may push 5 yards in any direction.

abilities.name: Tethered Soul
abilities.description: If killed within 6 yards of friendly Enforcer/Henchman/Master, that character may discard card to bind spirit as friendly Shackled Spirit adjacent.

actions: (1) Serpent Punch (Martial Arts) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Severe inflicts Weak CF. Crow Poisoned Chi: After damaging, target gains Poison +1.
(1) Shuriken (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: z8 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. Ram Poison Coated: After, target gains Poison +1.
system.notes: Thugs bound to sorcerer Wei Lu through inherited magical oaths. When killed near Ten Thunders leader, spirits bound to fight on.
